title: site.inventory.completed.v1 payload
description: Payload of the site.inventory.completed.v1 event — notification that a site/domain inventory pass has completed. Thin notification projection of context/site-context.
$comment: compat_class: open (event payload, ADR-0012/ADR-0024). Authority: approved plan §2 event row (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §2, §5 'event/ 6종', deliverable 6 — 'site_id from identifiers'); events/catalog/README.md CONFIRMED topic list (site.inventory.completed.v1, producer site-discovery-service); docs/architecture/contract-catalog.md:23 (SiteContext idempotency key 'site_id+inventory_version'). site_id $ref's common/identifiers/v1 $defs.site_id directly (deliverable 6 instruction), the same $def context/site-context/v1#/properties/site_id resolves to. inventory_version mirrors context/site-context/v1#/properties/inventory_version shape (opaque non-empty string, no fixed grammar).
